headline: Assessing Automatic Data Processing’s Valuation After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Setting the scene on Automatic Data Processing Automatic Data Processing (ADP) has drawn investor attention recently as its share price, last closing at US$215.06, reflects mixed return figures over different periods, including a gain over the past month and a decline over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Automatic Data Processing.
